long_description:
New master node VIP are not advertised on the NGAS and NGCS switches.
Noticed frr.conf file syntax for BGP advertising is different compared to the old master nodes.
Incident source: CHG14246836 - Emil Rasyad (IaaS CORE)
short_description: Master node VIP not advertised on new master nodes
close_notes:
(All Timestamps must be in UTC)
Issue Summary: Master node VIP not advertised on new master nodes
SME Findings: 
Reason of Escalation: 
Resolution Steps: The issue is faced on newly expanded nodes in mzone736 as they are added with support for DualNIC which is not currently supported by Code.

Next action:
The newly expanded nodes with HostOS 7 version will be contracted and added back again with single NIC support as currently added nodes with HostOS 7 are expended with dual NIC enabled and its not supported.

Signature of Issue: New master node VIP are not advertised on the NGAS and NGCS switches.
Noticed frr.conf file syntax for BGP advertising is different compared to the old master nodes.
